title: Python for Beginners
description: A practical beginner Python course from first program through functions, files, classes, testing, and a capstone project.
audience: tutoring students who need Python practice
learners preparing for data science, automation, or backend development
goals: Write and run beginner Python programs
Use variables, strings, numbers, conditionals, loops, collections, and functions
Handle common errors and debug simple programs
Build small projects with tests and clear organization
